category.scope_note: Industrial AC motor comparison focused on UAE market access, ECAS conformity, GSO/IEC motor standards, grid compatibility, EMC, safety, and energy-efficiency direction.

target_market_label.zh: 阿联酋（ESMA / 迪拜水电局 / TRA）
target_market_label.zht: 阿聯酋（ESMA / 迪拜水電局 / TRA）

title.en: China-to-UAE Industrial Motor Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国工业电动机进入阿联酋：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國工業電動機進入阿聯酋：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China industrial AC motor documentation against UAE ESMA ECAS, GSO/IEC 60034, DEWA grid, TRA EMC/radio, and energy-efficiency expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国工业交流电动机文件与阿联酋 ESMA ECAS、GSO/IEC 60034、DEWA 电网、TRA EMC/无线电及能效要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國工業交流電動機文件與阿聯酋 ESMA ECAS、GSO/IEC 60034、DEWA 電網、TRA EMC/無線電及能效要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, ESMA ECAS approval, UAE import clearance, utility connection approval, radio/EMC approval, energy-efficiency approval, or market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current UAE ESMA, MOIAT, GSO, DEWA, ADDC/AADC, TRA, customs, and local authority requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or placing on the market.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、ESMA ECAS 批准、阿联酋进口清关、公共事业并网批准、无线电/EMC 批准、能效批准或市场准入批准。出口商和进口商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行阿联酋 ESMA、MOIAT、GSO、DEWA、ADDC/AADC、TRA、海关及地方主管机构要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、ESMA ECAS 批准、阿聯酋進口清關、公共事業併網批准、無線電/EMC 批准、能效批准或市場准入批准。出口商和進口商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行阿聯酋 ESMA、MOIAT、GSO、DEWA、ADDC/AADC、TRA、海關及地方主管機構要求。

answer_first.en: For UAE industrial AC motors, the main gaps are ESMA ECAS conformity, GSO/IEC 60034 documentation, 400 V 50 Hz grid rating, TRA treatment for radio-enabled products, and the fact that China CCC is not recognized.
answer_first.zh: 阿联酋工业交流电机的主要差距在于 ESMA ECAS 合格评定、GSO/IEC 60034 文件、400 V 50 Hz 电网额定值、带无线功能产品的 TRA 要求，以及中国 CCC 不被认可。
answer_first.zht: 阿聯酋工業交流電機的主要差距在於 ESMA ECAS 合格評定、GSO/IEC 60034 文件、400 V 50 Hz 電網額定值、帶無線功能產品的 TRA 要求，以及中國 CCC 不被認可。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly or upon UAE ESMA, MOIAT, GSO, DEWA, ADDC/AADC, TRA, or customs rule change
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must remain informational, source-linked, and verified by a human reviewer before human_reviewed can be true.
